name: Wyrmwood
description: Two skeletons lie slumped against a mossy trunk, their arms outstretched — one pointing east, one west. They have been here a very long time. There is no other landmark. Every direction looks like every other.
ambient: Silence presses in from all sides.
The bones shift with a faint hollow rattle, though nothing touches them.

objects.name: skeletons
objects.description: Two human skeletons, long dead. Whatever they carried has rotted away. Their arms point east and west respectively, as if disagreeing about the way out.
objects.description_snippet: Two skeletons slump against the roots, arms outstretched.

on_interact.look: Two lost souls. Their arms point in opposite directions. You wonder if either of them was right.
on_interact.move: The bones shift with a hollow clatter. Nothing useful is revealed.
on_interact.search: Rotted scraps of cloth. Nothing more.
